description: The exact upstream Nimiq commits this registry's truth renders + tokens were verified against. The vendored upstream/ checkouts are gitignored, so THIS file is the committed source of truth for 'what we are current with'. `nq audit` compares each `pinned` commit to the live branch tip; the weekly workflow auto-PRs a bump here when the drift is provably safe. Updating a pin here is the canonical way to record 'we re-synced to upstream X'.
